query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS chat_participants (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  conversationId INT NOT NULL,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  userName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  role ENUM('user', 'operator', 'admin') DEFAULT 'user' NOT NULL,
  lastReadAt BIGINT,
  isTyping BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  typingUpdatedAt BIGINT,
  joinedAt BIGINT NOT NULL,
  leftAt BIGINT,
  INDEX participant_conversation_idx (conversationId),
  INDEX participant_user_idx (userId),
  INDEX participant_conv_user_idx (conversationId, userId)
);
command:

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  conversationId INT NOT NULL,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  userName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  role ENUM('user', 'operator', 'admin') DEFAULT 'user' NOT NULL,
  lastReadAt BIGINT,
  isTyping BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  typingUpdatedAt BIGINT,
  joinedAt BIGINT NOT NULL,
  leftAt BIGINT,
  INDEX participant_conversation_idx (conversationId),
  INDEX participant_user_idx (userId),
  INDEX participant_conv_user_idx (conversationId, userId)
);
